case_for: Woods has occasionally flashed usable volume, as seen in his wk17 9.8-point outing, showing some week-to-week upside if targets spike unexpectedly.
case_against: His recent target share and role have produced consistently low point totals (mostly under 4 points), and the pregame projection of just 3.8 points reflects a marginal, low-usage role unlikely to suddenly produce a 12+ point game.
